description_long: This is a generously proportioned, contemporary single-seat sofa with a deep, plush seat cushion and oversized, loose back and side cushions. The upholstery is a soft, matte fabric in a uniform light gray color, giving it a cozy and inviting appearance. The armrests are wide and padded, blending seamlessly into the overall form, and are set at the same height as the backrest, creating a boxy silhouette. The sofa sits on low, barely visible legs, which are thin and likely made of metal, providing subtle elevation above the ground. The back and sides are fully upholstered, with no visible seams or decorative elements, emphasizing a minimalist, modern design. The overall look is casual and comfortable, suitable for urban parks, lounges, or public waiting areas.
description: A modern, oversized single-seat sofa with plush gray fabric, wide padded armrests, and loose cushions for a relaxed, inviting look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the deep, soft seat and large, loose back and side cushions, with wide armrests framing the seat.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thick, padded armrest and the depth of the seat, with the back cushion extending above the armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the fully upholstered, flat back panel and the tops of the loose back cushions peeking above.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the armrest and the layered arrangement of the back and side cushions.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: One large, loose seat cushion and two oversized, loose back cushions, with additional loose side cushions integrated into the armrests; all cushions are uniform in color and appear unattached.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, padded armrests at seat height, integrated into the sofa's boxy silhouette with a straight, slightly flared profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four thin, low-profile legs, likely metal, positioned near the corners and mostly recessed, providing minimal elevation and a floating appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight backrest with two large, loose cushions extending above the frame, continuous and unsegmented, with a soft, overstuffed look.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a soft, matte texture and no visible pattern, stitching, or decorative detailing.
